ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the project started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the project is expected to end */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated project */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Type of ticket (bug, feature, task) */,
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Priority level of the ticket */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Current status of the ticket */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary or title of the ticket */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the ticket */,
  "milestone" TEXT /* Milestone associated with the ticket */,
  "component" TEXT /* Component of the project affected by the ticket */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the ticket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES ticket_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES ticket_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_priority_id FOREIGN KEY ("priority_id") REFERENCES ticket_priorities ("priority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., developer, project manager) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket the comment pertains to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket the attachment is associated with */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the attachment */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the attachment */,
  "uploaded_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attachment was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "milestones" (
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each milestone */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the milestone belongs to */,
  "milestone_name" TEXT /* Name of the milestone */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the milestone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_milestones_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the component belongs to */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Status of the ticket at the time of change */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was changed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_history_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES ticket_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_history_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_priorities" (
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each priority level */,
  "priority_name" TEXT /* Name of the priority level (e.g., major, minor, critical) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the priority level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of ticket */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the ticket type (e.g., bug, feature, task) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ticket type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., new, in progress, closed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user joined the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchers" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user watching the ticket */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was added as a watcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., assignment, comment, update) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
